title: Minimum Number of Arrows to Burst Balloons
titleCn: 用最少数量的箭引爆气球

testcases.input: points = [[10,16],[2,8],[1,6],[7,12]] Output: 2 Explanation: The balloons can be burst by 2 arrows: - Shoot an arrow at x = 6, bursting the balloons [2,8] and [1,6]. - Shoot an arrow at x = 11, bursting the balloons [10,16] and [7,12].
testcases.expectedOutput: 2 Explanation: The balloons can be burst by 2 arrows: - Shoot an arrow at x = 6, bursting the balloons [2,8] and [1,6]. - Shoot an arrow at x = 11, bursting the balloons [10,16] and [7,12].

testcases.input: points = [[1,2],[3,4],[5,6],[7,8]] Output: 4 Explanation: One arrow needs to be shot for each balloon for a total of 4 arrows.
testcases.expectedOutput: 4 Explanation: One arrow needs to be shot for each balloon for a total of 4 arrows.

testcases.input: points = [[1,2],[2,3],[3,4],[4,5]] Output: 2 Explanation: The balloons can be burst by 2 arrows: - Shoot an arrow at x = 2, bursting the balloons [1,2] and [2,3]. - Shoot an arrow at x = 4, bursting the balloons [3,4] and [4,5].
testcases.expectedOutput: 2 Explanation: The balloons can be burst by 2 arrows: - Shoot an arrow at x = 2, bursting the balloons [1,2] and [2,3]. - Shoot an arrow at x = 4, bursting the balloons [3,4] and [4,5].
